arts.ttl: Preview: Dundee United vs. Aberdeen - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Sunday's Scottish Premiership clash between Dundee United and Aberdeen, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

Fourth meets third as Dundee United and Aberdeen go toe-to-toe at Tannadice in the evening kick-off of Sunday's Scottish Premiership full fixture card. Dundee United earned back-to-back Scottish Prem...
